title: Monitoring the immune response to vaccination with an inactivated vaccine associated to bovine neonatal pancytopenia by deep sequencing transcriptome analysis in cattle.
ehr_evidence: The study uses next-generation RNA sequencing (RNAseq) on blood samples from cattle, not electronic health records.
summary: A study using RNAseq to analyze the blood transcriptome of cattle vaccinated with a BVDV vaccine associated with bovine neonatal pancytopenia (BNP).
key_findings: Identified a novel cytokine-like gene highly upregulated after vaccination.
Revealed a coordinated immune response to dsRNA or dsRNA analogue after vaccination with an inactivated ssRNA vaccine.
limitations: Specific to a single vaccine type
